# Monitoring reference

Generated from `metaobjects/meta.notify.json` by `codegen/generators/monitor-docs.ts`
(via `bun run gen`) — this page cannot drift from the declared model.

## Notify adapters

| Adapter | Kind | Payloads | Required config | Templates |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| Email | email | AlertPayload / DigestPayload | `SMON_EMAIL_TO` | AlertEmail, DigestEmail |
| HaPush | push | AlertPayload / DigestPayload | `SMON_HA_URL`, `SMON_HA_TOKEN`, `SMON_HA_DEVICE` | - |
| Kuma | heartbeat | HeartbeatPayload | `SMON_KUMA_PUSH_URL` | - |
| Matrix | chat | AlertPayload / DigestPayload | `SMON_MATRIX_HOMESERVER`, `SMON_MATRIX_TOKEN`, `SMON_MATRIX_ROOM` | - |
| Stdout | stdout | AlertPayload / DigestPayload | - | - |

| Probe | Script | Tags | Config keys |
|---|---|---|---|
| DiskReport | `disk-report` | `DISK_CRITICAL`, `DISK_HIGH`, `NOMINAL`, `PROBE_FAILED` | - |

| LogTriage | `log-triage` | `FAILED_SERVICES`, `LOG_ERRORS`, `NOMINAL` | - |
| OllamaDoctor | `ollama-doctor` | `CPU_SPILL`, `DAEMON_DOWN`, `HEALTHY`, `LIMITED`, `NO_MODELS`, `PROBE_FAILED` | - |
| RunawayHunter | `runaway-hunter` | `KNOWN_OFFENDER`, `NOMINAL`, `PROBE_FAILED`, `RUNAWAY`, `WEDGED` | - |
| SmartHealth | `smart-health` | `DRIVE_AGING`, `DRIVE_FAILING`, `NOMINAL`, `PROBE_FAILED` | - |
| SysDiag | `sys-diag` | `CPU_HOG`, `HIGH_LOAD`, `MEMORY_PRESSURE`, `THERMAL`, `NOMINAL`, `PROBE_FAILED` | - |
